caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" printed on it is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and black designs behind him, alongside racks of clothing and a wall covered in framed photographs. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left side that reads "SHIT" and one on the right that reads "PROPERLY FIT". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. The background, equipment, and on-screen logos remain static throughout the sequence, focusing the action on the man's movements as he delivers his speech.
